content.scenarioHint: 同事邀请你下班后一起去聚餐，但你今晚有安排，想礼貌拒绝并表达感谢，同时提议下次参加。
content.speakerText: Hey, we're heading to that new taco place after work—want to come?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我们下班后去那家新 taco 餐厅，一起来吗？
expectedAnswers: That sounds awesome! I actually have a prior commitment tonight, but I’d love to join you next time!
I really appreciate the invite—I’ve got a family call tonight, but let me buy you all coffee next week!
Wish I could! I’m trying to stick to a budget this month, but don’t wait up for me—next round’s on me!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰礼貌地拒绝了邀请并表达了感谢
语言准确性：语法和时态使用是否正确，是否避免了生硬表达
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常对话习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'appreciate', 'next time', 'commitment' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: The team is going to karaoke after dinner—want to come?
content.speakerTextCn: 团队下班后去唱K，一起来吗？
expectedAnswers: I’d love to, but I’ve got a late Zoom call. Maybe next time?
Karaoke? I’m not the best singer—but I’ll come if you promise not to make me go first!
I’m a bit tired tonight, but I really appreciate the invite. Let me know when you plan the next one!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰拒绝但保持积极态度，提供替代方案或未来意愿
语言准确性：使用自然口语结构，如 'I’d love to, but...', 'I’m a bit tired', 'Let me know'
表达自然度：语气真诚、有幽默感或共情，符合职场社交语境
关键词覆盖：使用了 'appreciate the invite', 'next time', 'plan the next one' 等场景高频表达
